meta.title: 2. Asset Management and Security with Ralph Langner
meta.description:
Ralph Langner of Stuxnet fame has been spending most of the past five years working on ICS asset management. He begins by asking questions about how much the audience knows about their assets, PLC’s, computers, networks and even sites. Unfortunately the answers are typically only hunches and probabilities. As Deming said,”Without data, you’re just another person with an opinion.”

Ralph is always a compelling and interesting speaker, and he brings his flair and strong opinions to the Highway.

He closes with two important claims/statements:

1) If you don’t know what you have, you cannot know your risk

2) If you can’t manage what you have, you cannot manage your risk.
